system.name: Spectre
system.summary: Ecosystem manifest for @phcdevworks/spectre-ui — the Layer 2 styling-contract package of the Spectre system.

foundation.title: Foundation
foundation.description: Base design-system packages that higher layers build on.
notes: Foundation packages must remain reusable, framework-light, and safe for broad consumption.

@phcdevworks/spectre-ui.description: Layer 2 styling contract between @phcdevworks/spectre-tokens and downstream adapters or apps. Provides CSS bundles, Tailwind preset, and class-recipe functions.
notes: Layer 2 of the Spectre system. May depend only on spectre-tokens and external libraries.
CSS bundles and class-recipe functions are the primary public surface.
Known consumers: spectre-components, spectre-shell, spectre-ui-astro (declared in the central spectre-manifest registry).

@phcdevworks/spectre-tokens.description: Design-token source for the Spectre system.

notes: Foundation packages may depend only on other foundation packages or external libraries.

boundaryConstraints.rule: Runtime dependencies are limited to @phcdevworks/spectre-tokens and external libraries.
boundaryConstraints.reason: spectre-ui is a foundation-layer styling contract and must not import higher-layer or peer Spectre packages at runtime.

preferredEntrypoints.task: use Tailwind preset with Spectre tokens

generationRules: Import CSS bundles from @phcdevworks/spectre-ui (index.css, base.css, components.css, utilities.css).
Use createSpectreTailwindPreset or createSpectreTailwindTheme from @phcdevworks/spectre-ui/tailwind for Tailwind integration.
Use class-recipe functions (e.g. getButtonClasses, getCardClasses) rather than writing raw Tailwind class strings.
Run npm run check before staging any commit — all checks must pass.
usageGuidance: Include @phcdevworks/spectre-ui/index.css to get all Spectre base, component, and utility styles.
Use @phcdevworks/spectre-ui/tailwind to extend a Tailwind config with Spectre token values.
Class-recipe functions provide type-safe, variant-aware class strings for each component family.
safeDefaults: Do not import from @phcdevworks/spectre-tokens directly when using spectre-ui — token values are already baked into the CSS bundles.
Do not hand-edit files in dist/ — they are generated on build.
Do not add runtime Spectre package dependencies beyond @phcdevworks/spectre-tokens.
